text.title: Side-Project Financial Runway Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to build and revisit the runway model.

step.name: collect-inputs
step.input: Operator's monthly expenses + MRR dashboard + savings statement
step.action: Enumerate all categories: housing, food, health insurance, hosting, taxes, savings, business subs. No exclusions.

step.name: compute-baseline
step.action: runway_months = savings_buffer / (burn_personal + burn_business - mrr_current). mrr_pct_of_burn = mrr_current / (burn_personal + burn_business).

step.name: scenarios-and-stress
step.input: Baseline + geo-arbitrage target city + stress scenarios
step.action: Model geo-arbitrage burn reduction (30-60%). Model flat MRR 12mo. Model MRR -20% over 6mo. Compute runway under each.

step.name: evaluate-trigger
step.action: Check: runway_months >= 12 AND mrr_pct_of_burn >= 0.30 AND mrr_3mo_growth_pct > 0. ALL must hold for decision_status=leave.
step.decision-gate: If any of the three conditions fails → decision_status != leave; document plan B.

step.name: schedule-quarterly-revisit
step.action: Calendar-block the next quarter's review. Update review_quarter field. Validator pass.
step.output: Versioned runway model + next review date.
